pi_items.verified_value: Should be .DDP not .DPN - DreamPlan uses .DDP file extension
pi_items.source: Web search on DreamPlan file formats (multiple sources including filext.com, fileinfo.com, file-extensions.org) confirm DreamPlan projects use .DDP extension. .DPN is used by Depiction GIS software, not DreamPlan. DreamPlan Home Design Software file extensions documentation confirms .DDP is the project format.
Path appears in verifier.py (line 36) and export_result.ps1 (line 15). Script writes result JSON to this location after task execution.
Path appears in setup_task.ps1 (line 42) where Unix timestamp is written, and in export_result.ps1 (line 14) where it is read.

Verified in verifier.py lines 98 and 114 which check for size_bytes >= 10000. This equals 10 KB and is a reasonable threshold for JPEG floor plan images with actual visual content. Confirmed by analysis of verifier logic.

Verified in verifier.py line 130 which checks for size_bytes >= 30000. This equals 30 KB and is a reasonable threshold for a more complex 3D exterior view JPEG compared to simpler 2D floor plans. The larger threshold for 3D views is logical.

pi_items.metadata_value: Contemporary House is available as a sample project in DreamPlan
pi_items.verified_value: Contemporary House is confirmed as a sample project in DreamPlan v9.28
pi_items.source: Evidence documentation at /examples/dreamplan_home_design_software_env/evidence_docs/README.md states all 5 tasks use 'the Contemporary House sample project' with screenshot evidence showing 'Contemporary House loaded in 3D editor with title bar: DreamPlan by NCH Software - Contemporary House'. Environmental setup script confirms sample project download.

pi_items.metadata_value: Task requires exporting floor plans and 3D views as JPG images
pi_items.verified_value: DreamPlan supports JPG and PNG export
pi_items.source: NCH Software official website (nchsoftware.com) confirms: 'Export your project as JPG, PNG, OBJ, STL, 3D model, webviewer and more.'

privileged_info_summary: The task uses DreamPlan Home Design v9.28 (by NCH Software) with the Contemporary House sample project. The task requires creating a second floor addition by generating two floor plans and one 3D exterior view as JPEG exports, plus saving the project. All file paths, JSON result paths, and file size thresholds (10KB minimum for floor plans, 30KB for 3D exterior) are verified to be correct based on the implementation in verifier.py and export scripts. However, there is one critical error: the project file extension specified is .DPN, but DreamPlan's native project format uses the .DDP extension. This error will cause task verification to fail if the verifier strictly checks for the .dpn extension, though the exported images (JPGs) themselves are verified to be correct formats.
